author: doll-agent
content:
Phase 2 landed:

DynArray widening:
- DynArray::DateTime64(Array<DateTime64, IxDyn>, TimeUnit) and DynArray::Timedelta64 struct-tuple variants (TimeUnit alongside the data because Element::dtype() returns a single fixed unit).
- dispatch! macro updated to bind only the inner Array, ignoring the unit slot.
- New constructors: DynArray::from_datetime64(arr, unit), from_timedelta64(arr, unit).
- New accessors: try_into_datetime64() -> (Array<DateTime64, IxDyn>, TimeUnit), try_into_timedelta64.
- DynArray::zeros now constructs the time variants with the requested unit.
- DynArray::astype rejects time-dtype source/target with a clear 'use dedicated arithmetic, not generic casts' message — datetime/numeric promotion isn't a thing in NumPy either.

NPY round-trip:
- load_dynamic_from_reader now produces the new DynArray variants for DateTime64/Timedelta64 headers and preserves the unit. New end-to-end test verifies (save typed → load_dynamic → unit preserved → unwrap typed).

Arithmetic kernels (ferray-ufunc::ops::datetime):
- sub_datetime(a, b) -> Timedelta — element-wise subtraction of two datetime arrays.
- add_datetime_timedelta / sub_datetime_timedelta — datetime ± timedelta.
- add_timedelta / sub_timedelta — timedelta arithmetic.
- All use a nat_propagate helper: any NaT operand yields NaT in the output (matching NumPy).
- Same-unit operands required; ShapeMismatch on length differences. NumPy's implicit unit promotion is intentionally not done — matches ferray's 'no implicit precision changes' stance.
- 6 new arithmetic tests + 4 isnat tests.

chrono interop (ferray-core feature 'chrono'):
- DateTime64::to_chrono(unit) -> Option<DateTime<Utc>> and DateTime64::from_chrono(dt, unit) -> Option<Self>.
- Timedelta64::to_chrono(unit) -> Option<Duration> and Timedelta64::from_chrono(d, unit) -> Option<Self>.
- All return None for NaT or out-of-range. The chrono feature is forwarded through the umbrella ferray crate as 'ferray/chrono'.
- 5 chrono interop tests.

ferray-numpy-interop dynarray_to_arrow dispatch:
- DType::DateTime64(unit) → Arrow Timestamp(unit) array (Ns/Us/Ms/S — matches Arrow's TimeUnit set).
- DType::Timedelta64(unit) → Arrow Duration(unit) array.
- 2 new round-trip tests verify TimestampNanosecondArray / DurationMicrosecondArray emission.

Verification:
- cargo test --workspace --features ferray/full --features ferray/chrono: 60 test blocks, 0 failures
- cargo clippy --workspace --features ferray/full --features ferray/chrono -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo fmt: applied

Tracking remaining gaps:
- Implicit unit promotion in arithmetic (Ns + Us → Ns) — could land as a separate convenience layer
- chrono::NaiveDate / DateTime<FixedOffset> conversions for non-UTC timezones — current bridge is UTC-only
- DateTime64 ufunc operator overloads (impl Add<Timedelta64>, etc.) — currently functional API only
